topic: Space probe drop simulation — Jupiter's moons
image_prompt: SVG: space-probe simulation scene over an Io-like sulphurous surface in starry space with Jupiter visible; vertical 'Metres' scale 0–50 (in 10 m steps); probe at 0 m; 'time / s — Io: 7.4 s' readout box; moon-selector buttons Io, Europa, Ganymede, Callisto.

render_data.caption: Europa orbits Jupiter in approximately 3.5 days; its lit face seen from Earth cycles through phases.

topic: Ammeter + resistance wire circuits (correct vs incorrect)
image_prompt: SVG: two circuit diagrams using standard symbols (cell, open switch, resistance wire as rectangle resistor, ammeter Ⓐ). 'Incorrect' has the ammeter on a parallel branch off the wire (not in series). 'Correct' has the ammeter in series with the resistance wire in the single loop.

SVG: clean ruled table of radiation absorption by body tissue. Columns ultraviolet, X-rays (low energy), gamma rays; rows absorption by skin (high, low, low), absorption by bones (high, high, low), absorption by soft tissue (high, medium, low).
